description: STILL-FAIL-CLOSED (issue #199): a pending (unresolved) tracked-change revision occurs INSIDE a field code -- e.g. a cross-reference field whose displayed result is itself under a live counterparty edit. Which literal field result is operative is ambiguous independent of the accept-all rule for ordinary pending revisions. Must fail closed to reason=unnormalizable_input.

paragraphs.heading: Governing Law
paragraphs.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Delaware.
